#### Instructions

* Send an invite to your tracker to telegramircrr@protonmail.com
* Replace `${TRACKER_ENDPOINT}` with your tracker endpoint (E.G. `mytracker.tld`, `tracker.domain.tld`)

#### Requirements

* [ ] I have sent an invite for the tracker to telegramircrr@protonmail.com
* Tracker endpoint: `${TRACKER_ENDPOINT}`
